title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production best practices for deploying TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with OAuth and IAM, type-safe database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. These patterns apply across platforms beyond AWS.
